content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad selloff with Nifty -1.40%, India VIX +10.95% to 19.35 — clear risk-off tape. However, defensives (Pharma, Energy upstream, FMCG, select PSUs) holding up. Our book is well-positioned with pharma + coal + upstream oil exposures showing relative strength. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails, not adding fresh risk into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.5% from entry. Current SL 1025.28 already above entry. Tightening slightly to 1030 (just below R1 pivot 1038 and intraday consolidation low) to lock in ~4.7% gain. Trail-gap discipline: SL sits ~1.6% below CMP 1046, healthy buffer. Thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, MOFSL Buy) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2% but SL 119 still has 2.7% room. With VIX surging +10.9%, gold ETF is a natural hedge to equity book. Hold; no SL change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL 1762 equals breakeven+1.6%. CMP 1773.70 — SL only 0.7% below CMP, too tight per trail-gap discipline. Actually, this would be a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY (SL already 478, target already 500). Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 218.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY check — values unchanged. Convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative -0.6% but Brent at $111+ thesis intact. Bullish Marubozu on 4/28 confirms accumulation. SL 295 (~2% below CMP) appropriate; not yet at breakeven so cannot trail to it."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally green +0.5%. Pharma sector defensive on risk-off day. SL 22.85 ~3.7% below CMP — fine. No change."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gains; thesis intact, SL trailed up modestly. Trail-gap ~1.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge against equity drawdown on a high-VIX day. SL 119 has adequate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already above entry 1734 (breakeven+). Not tightening further as 1762 is only 0.7% below CMP — pushing tighter risks self-inflicted exit on intraday noise. Q4 results May 21 — will reassess closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 already above entry 469 (breakeven+1.9%). CMP 485.7 only 1.6% above SL — already tight; further tightening risks stop-out on noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%; SL 195 only 1.2% below CMP. Q4 PAT +68%, CLSA TP 220 — let it work. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Mildly negative; Brent thesis intact. SL 295 ~2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive pharma exposure; small +0.5%. No action needed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATACHEM (7.8x volume, Q4 board May 4) — speculative; Q3 was a loss. Pass for now, revisit post-results. SYNGENE — supplementary research flags it CRASHED 12-13% on Q4 disappointment with FY26 PAT -20-36%; the +5.91% intraday is a dead-cat bounce, NOT an entry. Avoid. EMCURE near ATH at 34x P/E vs peer 17-19x, Q4 results May 5 — binary event within 3 sessions, NO new entry per binary-event rule. PIRAMALFIN — 390% PAT growth driven by one-off imaging sale; Jefferies Hold flags stretched valuation. Pass. RBLBANK — broker target dispersion 144-310, NIM contracting, credit card stress through H1 FY27. Pass. CANHLIFE — sector GST headwind, sub-scale, recently listed. Pass. CHENNPETRO/GESHIP — GESHIP already has working OPEN BUY @ 1542; not stacking. CHENNPETRO not analyzed deeply. HINDUNILVR/ITC/BHARTIARTL/RELIANCE/BAJFINANCE/TECHM — strong defensives but on a -1.4% Nifty day with VIX +11%, not adding fresh long risk. Will reassess if VIX cools or Nifty stabilizes above 24,000.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, cash 63% — well below soft 80% target. Reserve is justified today: India VIX +11%, Nifty -1.4%, FII/DII flows zero. This is a binary risk-off tape, not an accumulation day. Existing book has good defensive tilt (pharma 2 names, coal, upstream oil, gold ETF, NBFC, MFI bank). 5-day P&L -₹3,991 with 13% win rate is concerning — overtrading signal. Today's discipline: zero new entries unless unambiguously asymmetric, focus on protecting unrealized gains in PNBHOUSING/SUNPHARMA/COALINDIA via SL management. GESHIP OPEN BUY @ 1542 left in place; original thesis (Hormuz disruption, shipping rates) still valid, will not modify or cancel."
}
